products.name: SkyDefender RF Cyber-Takeover
products.descriptor: RF-based counter-UAS system that seizes control of rogue drones for safe landing

evidence.snippet:
Drone Radio Frequency Cyber Takeover
====================================
DefenSync SkyDefender / Interception

RF cyber-takeover utilizes a short, precise signal to seize control of rogue drones, redirecting them along a predetermined safe route for a controlled landing. This surgical approach minimizes collateral damage and intervention range is optimized for effective communication disruption.

products.name: SkyDefender Laser Beam
products.descriptor: High-energy laser counter-UAS system for precision drone destruction

evidence.snippet:
Laser Beam
----------
DefenSync SkyDefender / Interception

Laser-based systems offer unmatched precision in targeting and neutralizing rogue drones. By emitting concentrated beams of light, these systems accurately destroy drone structures and electronics, rendering them inoperable.

unresolved_questions: SkyDefender Radar: resource-0002 (slug 'radar', status=fetched) served identical RF Detection content as resource-0008, likely a Wix CMS routing issue. Specific radar model/technical details remain unknown; product evidence sourced from homepage.
Skydio X10 Blue UAS status: The X10D explicitly states 'On the Blue UAS Cleared list' but the X10 spec sheet only claims NDAA compliance with no Blue UAS mention. X10 Blue UAS classified as unknown.
All SkyDefender C-UAS products are consultation/quote-only with no pricing or in-stock language; readiness classified as unknown for all.
